scripts.typecheck:all: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w @dxd/shared && npm run typecheck -w @dxd/master-web && npm run typecheck -w @dxd/mobile
scripts.lint: echo "Add eslint when apps are scaffolded"
scripts.test:resolve-check: npm run build:shared && node scripts/assert-resolve-check.mjs && node scripts/assert-resolve-check.mjs
scripts.dev:master-web: npm run build -w @dxd/shared && npm run dev -w @dxd/master-web
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run build -w @dxd/shared && cd apps/mobile && npm run start
